ACS API required a key in this environment; fallback uses county population estimates for 2021-2024, with poverty/unemployment flagged missing.
Not used in main models because no post-2024 public admissions file is available and TEDS-A is admission episodes, not people.
Mortality is downstream and too slow for 2024 early capacity evaluation; no 2025 post period.
Large multi-domain covariate source; ACS was used for first-pass covariates.
Current HPSA status is useful for moderation but not a historical annual panel in this first build.
